en: "If his offering is a sacrifice of peace offering, if he offers an animal from the herd, male or female, he shall offer it without blemish before the LORD.
zh: “人的供物若是作平安祭，如果獻的是牛，必須在耶和華面前獻一頭沒有殘疾的公牛或母牛；

en: And he shall lay his hand on the head of his offering and kill it at the entrance of the tent of meeting, and Aaron's sons the priests shall throw the blood against the sides of the altar.
zh: 他要按手在他的供物的頭上，在會幕門口宰殺牠；亞倫子孫作祭司的，要把血潑在祭壇的四周。

en: And from the sacrifice of the peace offering, as a food offering to the LORD, he shall offer the fat covering the entrails and all the fat that is on the entrails,
zh: 他要從平安祭中奉上獻給耶和華的火祭，就是把遮蓋內臟的脂肪，和內臟上的一切脂肪，

en: and the two kidneys with the fat that is on them at the loins, and the long lobe of the liver that he shall remove with the kidneys.
zh: 兩腎和腎上近腰旁的脂肪，和腎旁的肝葉，一起取下。

en: Then Aaron's sons shall burn it on the altar on top of the burnt offering, which is on the wood on the fire; it is a food offering with a pleasing aroma to the LORD.
zh: 亞倫的子孫要把這些放在祭壇炭火上的木柴上面，在燔祭上焚燒，作獻給耶和華馨香的火祭。

en: "If his offering for a sacrifice of peace offering to the LORD is an animal from the flock, male or female, he shall offer it without blemish.
zh: 人若是獻羊作平安祭的供物給耶和華，必須獻一隻沒有殘疾的公羊或母羊。

en: If he offers a lamb for his offering, then he shall offer it before the LORD,
zh: 他獻的供物若是一隻綿羊羔，他要把牠牽到耶和華面前，

en: lay his hand on the head of his offering, and kill it in front of the tent of meeting; and Aaron's sons shall throw its blood against the sides of the altar.
zh: 按手在他的供物的頭上，在會幕門口宰殺牠；亞倫的子孫要把羊血潑在祭壇的四周。

en: Then from the sacrifice of the peace offering he shall offer as a food offering to the LORD its fat; he shall remove the whole fat tail, cut off close to the backbone, and the fat that covers the entrails and all the fat that is on the entrails
zh: 他要從平安祭中奉上獻給耶和華的火祭，就是把羊的脂肪，從靠近脊骨的地方取下來的整條肥尾巴，遮蓋內臟的脂肪和在內臟上的一切脂肪，

en: and the two kidneys with the fat that is on them at the loins and the long lobe of the liver that he shall remove with the kidneys.
zh: 兩腎和腎上近腰的脂肪，和腎旁的肝葉，一起取下。

en: And the priest shall burn it on the altar as a food offering to the LORD.
zh: 祭司把這些焚燒在祭壇上，是獻給耶和華作食物的火祭。

en: "If his offering is a goat, then he shall offer it before the LORD
zh: “人的供物若是一隻山羊，就要把羊牽到耶和華面前，

en: and lay his hand on its head and kill it in front of the tent of meeting, and the sons of Aaron shall throw its blood against the sides of the altar.
zh: 按手在羊頭上，然後在會幕門口宰殺牠；亞倫的子孫要把血潑在祭壇的四周，

en: Then he shall offer from it, as his offering for a food offering to the LORD, the fat covering the entrails and all the fat that is on the entrails
zh: 他要從供物中奉上獻給耶和華的火祭，就是把遮蓋內臟的脂肪和內臟上的脂肪，

en: and the two kidneys with the fat that is on them at the loins and the long lobe of the liver that he shall remove with the kidneys.
zh: 兩腎和腎上近腰的脂肪，和腎旁的肝葉，都要一起取下。

en: And the priest shall burn them on the altar as a food offering with a pleasing aroma. All fat is the LORD's.
zh: 祭司把這些焚燒在祭壇上，作為馨香火祭的食物。一切脂肪都是屬於耶和華的，

en: It shall be a statute forever throughout your generations, in all your dwelling places, that you eat neither fat nor blood."
zh: 任何脂肪和血你們都不可吃。這是你們在一切住處一條世代永存的律例。”
